prompt: Create a soft watercolor floral painting using the flower shape in image 1 and the background wash in image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a soft watercolor floral painting. Incorporate the specific arrangement and delicate outlines of the tulips and lily of the valley from image 1 as the main floral subject. For the background, apply a soft pink watercolor wash that replicates the gradient and distinctive texture visible in image 2.
